fields.name: chatHistory
fields.comment: Formatted chat history (previous turns, excluding the latest user message)

fields.name: guidanceContext
fields.comment: Compiled guidance from AgentGuidance records, injected into agent system prompt

fields.name: aiResponse
fields.comment: Agent response text returned to the caller

fields.name: caseUuid
fields.comment: Case UUID used to load repository data (e.g. departments)

fields.name: parsedDraft
fields.comment: Parsed onboarding request values extracted from uploaded content

fields.name: parseFeedback
fields.comment: Parse status message for the caller

fields.name: departmentContext
fields.comment: Available departments list injected into the parse agent system prompt

fields.name: inputStream
fields.comment: Uploaded PDF document stream for OCR
